channel.title: App Update Feed
channel.description: Latest updates and news for the Example App

item.title: Version 1.0 Released
item.description: This update includes bug fixes and performance improvements.

item.title: New Features in Version 1.1
item.description: Version 1.1 introduces a dark mode and better offline functionality.

item.title: Upcoming Maintenance
item.description: Scheduled maintenance for the app on 15 Dec 2024.
